creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

I have bunch of dbus-related messages in my syslog. How can I fix them? This is FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p8 on physical hardware. 

Here are the actual messages:
pacija@mephala:~ % cat /var/log/messages | grep dbus | grep Rejected
Jan 11 13:11:18 mephala dbus[702]: [system] Rejected send message, 2 matched rules; type="method_call", sender=":1.32" (uid=1001 pid=1093 comm="xfce4-session ") interface="org.freedesktop.ConsoleKit.Manager" member="CanSuspend" error name="(unset)" requested_reply="0" destination=":1.1" (uid=0 pid=723 comm="/usr/local/sbin/console-kit-daemon --no-daemon ")
